apps.name: LiveContainer+Sidestore
apps.localizedDescription:
### Hướng dẫn cài đặt Livecontainer+sidestore bằng Impactor

- **Impactor** (trước đây gọi là *Plume Impactor*) là một công cụ sideloader hiện đại, đa nền tảng, được phát triển bởi **khcrysalis**. Impactor sẽ tự động thêm các entitlement liên quan đến *increased-memory-limit* và *HealthKit* cho **LiveContainer**.

#### Các bước thực hiện trên PC:

1. Tải đúng phiên bản **Impactor**(https://github.com/khcrysalis/Impactor) từ GitHub dựa trên hệ điều hành và kiến trúc máy của bạn.  
   > Lưu ý: chúng ta tải **Impactor**, không phải **plumesign**.

2. Cài đặt và mở **Impactor**.

3. Đảm bảo thiết bị của bạn xuất hiện ở góc trên bên phải. Nếu không thấy, hãy kiểm tra ghi chú phía trên hoặc thử dùng cổng USB/dây cáp khác.

4. Nhấn vào biểu tượng **cài đặt (hình bánh răng)** → chọn **Add Account** để đăng nhập bằng Apple ID.  
   > Nếu gặp sự cố đăng nhập, hãy tham khảo hướng dẫn hoặc liên hệ nhà phát triển Impactor.

5. Nhấn nút **Back** để quay lại.

6. Kéo và thả file **LiveContainer + SideStore .ipa** vào cửa sổ Impactor.

7. Đảm bảo tùy chọn **Only Register Main Bundle** đã được chọn.

8. Nhấn **Install**.

9. Trên iPhone/iPad, vào **Cài đặt (Settings)** → **Cài đặt chung (General)** → **VPN & Quản lý thiết bị (Device Management)** và xác minh **LiveContainer**.

10. Sau đó, tiếp tục phần **Setup after Installing** để hoàn tất cài đặt **LiveContainer** và **SideStore**.

### Thiết lập sau khi cài đặt trên IPhone/Ipad

Sau khi đã cài đặt **LiveContainer + SideStore**, bạn cần nhập chứng chỉ từ SideStore để LiveContainer có thể ký ứng dụng.

#### Các bước thực hiện:

1. Mở **SideStore** bằng cách nhấn nút **SideStore** ở góc trên bên trái của trang "Apps".

2. Vào phần **cài đặt của SideStore** và đăng nhập.  
   - Nếu trước đó bạn đã cài SideStore, có thể bạn vẫn đang đăng nhập.  
   - Tuy nhiên, vì SideStore tích hợp sẵn không thể lấy lại thông tin đăng nhập của bạn, hãy **đăng xuất và đăng nhập lại**.

3. Kết nối với **LocalDevVPN**, sau đó vào trang **My apps** và nhấn **Refresh All**.

4. Thoát SideStore và mở **LiveContainer**.  
   - Bạn có thể làm điều này bằng cách nhấn biểu tượng **quit** trong trang Apps của SideStore hoặc dùng **app switcher**.

5. Vào phần **cài đặt của LiveContainer**, chọn **Import Certificate from SideStore**, rồi nhấn **OK**.

6. Nếu nút **Import Certificate** chuyển thành **Remove Certificate**, nghĩa là chứng chỉ đã được nhập thành công.  
   - Bạn có thể kiểm tra lại trong trang **JIT-Less Mode Diagnose** để xác nhận mọi thứ đã được cấu hình đúng.

apps.name: Summarizer: Brainnotes
apps.localizedDescription:
Unlock the power of your content with Summarizer: Brainnotes, the ultimate AI-powered tool for turning information into knowledge. Whether you're a student, professional, or lifelong learner, Summarizer: Brainnotes helps you learn faster and retain more — with less effort.

With Summarizer: Brainnotes, you can instantly convert audio, YouTube videos, PDFs, and images into clear, organized notes. No more manual transcription or summarizing — just quick, accurate content extraction in seconds.

Once you’ve got your notes, Summarizer: Brainnotes lets you automatically generate flashcards and quizzes to reinforce your learning and test your understanding on the go.

Prefer audio? Summarizer: Brainnotes can turn your notes into podcast-style audio, so you can listen and learn while commuting, exercising, or relaxing.

Studying in multiple languages? No problem. Summarizer: Brainnotes supports translation into over 60 languages, making it easy to understand and share knowledge globally.

Need deeper insights? Just chat with your notes like an AI tutor — ask questions, clarify concepts, and explore topics in a whole new way.

From simplifying content to supercharging study sessions, Summarizer: Brainnotes is your all-in-one tool for transforming how you learn and grow.

All features (including summarization, flashcards, audio notes, translation, and AI tutoring) require a paid subscription.

No features are available without purchase.

Pricing and subscription options are displayed within the app at checkout.

Terms Of Service: https://www.brainnotes.app/tos
Privacy Policy: https://www.brainnotes.app/privacy

apps.name: Birthday Countdown: CandlesUp
apps.localizedDescription:
Never miss a special day again. CandlesUp is your all-in-one birthday reminder, countdown widget, and calendar tracker. Import birthdays from contacts or calendars and get smart reminders with birthday wishes.

Key Features
- Effortless Tracking – Manually add birthdays or import them directly from your contacts.
- Countdown Timer – See the exact time left until upcoming birthdays.
- Personalized Experience – Set up your own birthday profile and track your countdown.
- Rich Details – View age, Western & Chinese zodiac signs, and more.
- Quick Actions – Manage contacts, notifications, and calendar views with a single tap.
- Insights - Get to know you friends and their bday analytics

Get your Weekly Recap

Track your Concerts and Music Festivals
Keep track of every show you've been to... ever! Tag your friends & share your photos, too.

apps.name: Pomidor: Focus & Rest Timer
apps.localizedDescription:
Build focus, structure your time, and boost your productivity - one session at a time.

Pomidor: Focus & Study Timer helps you stay consistent, productive, and mindful throughout your day.
Switch effortlessly between Focus and Rest sessions, track your performance, and design a routine that works for you. Whether you’re working, studying, or practicing deep focus, Pomidor keeps you on track with purpose and clarity.

apps.localizedDescription: Albums is the Apple Music player that puts you in control of your music. Whether you just want to throw on album shuffle or spend hours meticulously sorting and filtering your collection, Albums cares about your music library as much as you do.

apps.localizedDescription: Every journey deserves to be cherished. Timeland is your personal AI travel journalist. Simply upload your photos, and watch as it automatically weaves them into a beautiful journal with smart summaries. Effortlessly organize your travel memories and make every look back a heartfelt experience.

apps.name: ProKnockOut
apps.localizedDescription:
Come and experience the Top 1 professional cutout and photo editing tool in Appstore! With this tool, you will become a master in photo editing area even if you are a beginner. One-click cutout、 multi-layer synthesis of pictures、 making ID photos、collages、 instantly erase redundant passers-by in photos、green screen cutouts、replace the sky··· In addition， a large number of templates and stickers making design extremely simple。

*One-click cutout & batch cutout
-After selecting the picture, you can get the results of the cutout with one click. Buckle out the characters, animals, products, stamps and other content in the picture with one click, and also support batch cutouts, which greatly improves the efficiency of the cutout.

*ID photo
ID camera + multiple ID photo sizes + automatic cutout + modified background color + exquisite male and female formal wear + beauty

apps.name: Ayakashi Rise: AFK Demon Hunt
apps.localizedDescription:
Reports of unidentified "evil spirits" have surged across the city, prompting authorities to urge citizens to exercise extreme caution. Numerous unexplained phenomena have been confirmed, with vehicles, animals, and humans alike exhibiting unknown and abnormal changes. Severe breaches have also occurred in the city's protective ward system. In response, officials have issued an unprecedented "Ayakashi-level" disaster warning.

But hope remains.
You have been chosen as the Agent, spearheading the Anomaly Control Bureau.
Gifted with special abilities, use the power of Resonance and lead ordinary students to turn them into the mightiest force. Your girls await your command.

〓Create a powerful team of adorable anime girls〓
Battle with the charming maidens who are ready to stand by your side. Come meet the cute and innocent class president, the cool ace of the athletics club, a girl from a clan of miko shamanesses, an aspiring idol, and many more unique characters! Recruit, foster, and unlock their potential. Collect, create your own unique team and tactics, power up your students, and vanquish the demon spirits of Tokyo!

〓Non-stop auto idle gameplay! No more grinding! The only way is forward!〓
The Agent and your girls never retreat. Hone your skills and teamwork with your students through club activities, and endlessly push through the city streets of Tokyo as you fight through the chaos. Even as you rest, your girls press on for you. Strengthen your team, claim victory, and protect the city!

〓 From urban legends to nightmare come to life! Strategize, command, and vanquish!〓
Urban legends that have been passed down through history have manifested on the city streets. Combine and utilize each girl's unique skills, uncover the identity of these unsettling, somewhat terrifying and strange spirits, and tactically gun down their weak point! Fear not, though! These girls have the most charming and alluring personalities that no demon spirit can withstand!

apps.name: Buffer Editor Code Editor
apps.localizedDescription:
Buffer Editor is a POWERFUL code and text editor that lets you easily develop software, view code or take notes on the go. Enjoy an editing experience that is both versatile and intuitive, and take your productivity to the next level.

• Connect to GitHub, GitLab, BitBucket, Custom Git, Dropbox, iCloud, Google Drive, SFTP, SSH, and FTP servers
• Git Operations for easy repository management
• Git Visual Merge Tool to resolve merge conflicts.
• Git Visual Branch and Commits History.
• Live editing—open, edit, and save files directly to remote services
• Network monitoring for remote services (FTP, SFTP, SSH)
• Built-in Terminal (SSH Client) with multiple terminals in tabs.
• Syntax highlighting & code autocomplete: ASP, AWK, ActionScript, Ada, Arduino, Bash, C, C++, C#, Clojure, Cobol, CSS, D, Dart, Dockerfile, Erlang, F#, Fortran, Gherkin, Go, HAML, Haskell, HTML (4 & 5), INI, Java, JavaScript, Julia, Kotlin, LaTeX, Common Lisp, Lua, Markdown, MATLAB, MQL (4 & 5), NSIS, Objective-C, Org Mode, Pascal, Perl, PHP, PowerShell, Progress, Prolog, Pug, Puppet, Python, Q/kdb+, R, reStructuredText, Ruby, Rust, Scala, Solidity, SQL, Stata, Swift, Terraform, TypeScript, TypeScript React, Verilog, VHDL, Visual Basic, Vue, x86 ASM, XML
• Vim mode support
• Symbol navigator / document outline
• Code autocompletion, with custom snippets.
• Find & replace with regular expression support
• Recursive file and content search—match and jump to any file at a specific line
• Find references in file and jump to any file
• Bracket matching and highlighting
• Line and word wrapping
• Unicode support
• Multiple windows, Split View, and Slide Over support
• Tabs with automatic restore—quickly switch between files and terminals
• Full screen mode
• Extended keyboard with coding keys
• Bluetooth keyboard support with shortcuts manager
• Customizable fonts, font sizes, and over 300 dark and light themes
• Full iOS Files integration—link external folders, open multiple files, import from any supported cloud provider
• Preview websites(HTML,JS,CSS) on local server in Safari
• Preview images, PDFs, movies, and documents
• Send files by email
• iOS "Open In" support (to and from other apps)
• Touch ID / Face ID protection

apps.localizedDescription:
The legendary “+99 Reinforced Wooden Stick” is finally here on mobile!

▶ An Original Story Unfolds!
Join Peace, Love, and Luna in an all-new adventure brought to life by ChronoLife Mobile.
Experience their unique journey of courage, growth, and laughter.

▶ Fast-Paced Hack & Slash Action!
Enhance your trusty wooden stick and sweep through endless waves of monsters!
Unlock powerful skills to fight faster, harder, and smarter.

▶ Reinforce to +99 — No Limits!
No breakage. No downgrade. Only pure enhancement!
Upgrade every weapon to +99 and forge the ultimate gear set.

▶ Tons of Content and Growth Systems!
From Ursus Dungeon to Guild Raids, dive into endless challenges.
Send adventurers on missions, decode scrolls, and grow stronger.
Meet the loyal “Assister” and harness the power of the “Ego” system!

▶ Gear Overflow Every Day!

Equip everything with a single tap and feel your strength surge.

▶ Unique Boss Battles Await!

apps.name: Simon's Cat
apps.localizedDescription:
Simon’s Cat is back in his latest pawsome adventure! Beat Match 3 puzzles to unearth the secret ancestral connections hiding in the gardens. Create powerful combos and use special pieces to become the Top Cat!

- Renovate and explore the unique gardens of the Simon’s Cat world!
- Over 9000+ challenging match-3 puzzles!
- An expansive story with twists and turns!

Discover the true meaning of community spirit in this adorable addition to the Simon’s Cat franchise!

apps.name: Beat Cop
apps.localizedDescription:
New York, more like a beast than a city. Explore it’s darkest corners and uncover its secrets as Jack Kelly, a former detective who has been framed for a murder. Degraded and forgotten by old pals, it’s your last chance to find the truth behind this whole terrible mess. The thing is, your new boss treats you horribly, your wife is a money sucking spawn from hell and the local mafia wants your head on a plate. I guess you could say, that things are complicated down here, in the middle of Brooklyn. Oh, and don't forget about writing tickets, reprimanding pedestrians & such. You're a beat cop after all.

NONLINEAR STORY WITH MULTIPLE ENDINGS
Someone framed you and no one cares about this but you. Turn every stone in this city and find out who did that. The further you investigate the more missing puzzles you’ll find, but be careful. Some things should never be brought to daylight.

THE ESSENCE OF '80 COP SHOWS
Have you ever dreamed of being one of the heroes of cop movies? Of course you did, like we all. Now you have a chance! Stay vigilant and quick-witted but remember that if this won’t work, you can always do some old school jaw wrecking. It’s ’80s after all!

THE HUMOR THAT YOUR MOM WOULDN'T APPROVE
Be sarcastic. Be gloom. Be whatever you want. There are thousands of things in this world you can laugh at, and even more you shouldn't, but who cares. It’s jungle out there baby, and sometimes you just need something to release the stress.

Using Temporary Email Pro app, you can instantly generate disposable temporary email address and immediately receive emails, including photos or any other attachments.

Forget about revealing your real email to everyone. It causes endless spam, advertising mailings, email hacking, and phishing attempts. Keep your real inbox clean and secure. Temp Mail provides a temporary, anonymous, free, disposable email address in 10minute mail style.

This app is an advanced version of services also known as 10minutemail, disposable-mail, fake email, guerrillamail, mailinator, getairmail,mohmal mail, throwawaymail, tempmail, tempail, anonymous-mail, spambox, tmail, burnermail, trashmail, 20minute email, and others. apps.name: Fait – The Machine - GHOST DVC IPA
apps.localizedDescription:
Fait – The Machine is an atmospheric action-adventure platformer set in the ruins of an abandoned machine civilization.

The player controls a furry creature named Fait, who, after waking up from a deep sleep in a time capsule, tries to find out the secret of his origin and understand what exactly happened in this abandoned world.

On his way, he discovers a large number of unique obstacles and tries to breathe life into the world around him. But does everyone agree with this?

apps.name: Vive le Roi 3
apps.localizedDescription:
«Vive le Roi 3» is a puzzle and anticipation game, without chance or timing, based on mini puzzles to be solved by choosing the right ladder on each floor to reach the king and save him from his executioner.

Inspired by the concept of labyrinths, the originality of «Vive le Roi 3» is to be able to modify the state of the active elements of the levels according to your choices.

Chúng tôi tin vào sự đơn giản—không cần chỉnh sửa hậu kỳ. Chỉ với một lần chạm, bạn có thể chụp những bức ảnh hoặc video cổ điển chân thực nhất, cho phép bạn tận hưởng khoảnh khắc mà không bị phân tâm.
Máy ảnh Dazz được lấy cảm hứng từ các máy ảnh phim cổ điển của những năm 80. Chúng tôi đã lấy mẫu phim thực tế để tái tạo màu sắc và kết cấu của nhiếp ảnh cổ điển.
Máy ảnh Dazz hỗ trợ chụp ở nhiều định dạng phim cổ điển khác nhau như phim 135, phim 120, máy ảnh đồ chơi, phim slide, máy ảnh nửa khung hình, máy ảnh chụp lấy liền, nhiếp ảnh phim 3D, máy ảnh dùng một lần và nhiều định dạng khác.

Ngoài nhiếp ảnh phim, máy ảnh Dazz còn cung cấp các cấu hình màu của máy ảnh kỹ thuật số hiện đại, bao gồm máy ảnh compact, máy ảnh CCD, và chúng tôi liên tục bổ sung thêm nhiều tùy chọn khác.
Bạn cũng có thể quay video với phong cách cổ điển, sử dụng các định dạng như máy quay phim 8mm, máy quay phim 16mm, máy quay băng VHS, máy quay DCR, máy quay phim và máy chiếu slide.

Khi bạn chụp ảnh và quay video, chúng tôi có một số tính năng và phụ kiện bổ sung thú vị dành cho bạn:
- Lưu bản âm bản và xử lý lại để đạt được các mức phơi sáng và nhiệt độ màu khác nhau. (Chỉ khả dụng trên một số máy ảnh)

- Hẹn giờ để chụp ảnh chậm.
- Đèn flash.
- Nhập các bức ảnh hiện có của bạn để chỉnh sửa. (Chỉ khả dụng trên một số máy ảnh)
- Điều chỉnh nhiệt độ màu và tông màu.
- Chuyển đổi giữa các tiêu cự cài đặt trước hoặc điều chỉnh tự do.
- Điều chỉnh bù phơi sáng.
- Điều chỉnh ISO và tốc độ màn trập.
- Cài đặt ổn định.

- Ống kính ánh sao.

Trở Về Tuổi Thơ Mobile (Tro Ve Tuoi Tho) là tựa game mô phỏng vừa được ra mắt tại thị trường Việt Nam vào cuối tháng 1 năm 2025. Ngay từ khi ra mắt, game đã nhận được hàng loạt đánh giá tích cực cũng như sự quan tâm nồng nhiệt của cộng đồng game thủ Việt Nam. Sau hơn nửa tháng kể từ ngày phát hành, game đã có hơn 1 triệu lượt tải và hàng trăm ngàn lượt đánh giá tích cực.

Game sẽ đưa người chơi trở về những năm 2000 và hóa thân thành các thanh thiếu niên thế hệ 8x 9x. Trong game, người chơi sẽ được trải nghiệm những ngày trưa hè không chịu ngủ trưa trốn đi câu cá cùng lũ bạn. Mua đồ ăn vặt ngoài cổng trường, chia nhau từng miếng bánh, từng ngụm nước ngọt mát lạnh. Tiết kiệm tiền ăn vặt để dành mua những món đồ chơi yêu thích.

Về cơ bản thì nhiệm vụ của người chơi là hoàn thành các nhiệm vụ trong game mô phỏng Trở Về Tuổi Thơ Mobile để khám phá tuổi thơ của thế hệ 8x 9x. Từ việc đi học, chơi đùa đơn giản cho tới câu cá kiếm tiền, thậm chí bạn còn có thể chọc chó để trải nghiệm cảm giác được “truy đuổi”.

Đặc biệt, một trong những hoạt động mà đa số thanh thiếu niên thế hệ 8x 9x yêu thích cũng sẽ có mặt trong game Trở Về Tuổi Thơ, đó chính là hoạt động mua kẹo rút thăm trúng thưởng. Người chơi có thể dùng số tiền tiết kiệm của mình để mua các viên kẹo được bàn bán trong căn tin, từ đó rút lấy con số may mắn và nhận được các phần thưởng hậu hĩnh.

Ngoại trừ các lối chơi và các hoạt động trong game, Trở Về Tuổi Thơ còn khiến không ít game thủ thích thú với đồ họa 2D đầy màu sắc. Đồng thời, game còn tái hiện lại chân thật những khung cảnh tuổi thơ của nhiều game thủ, khiến cho người chơi có cảm giác như mình đang thực sự quay về quá khứ và sống những ngày tháng vô tư vui vẻ.

7. Có chạy nền không?

apps.name: Battery Webhook
apps.localizedDescription:
Webhooks allow an application to send real-time data to another application whenever a specific event occurs. What if you could send battery information whenever you connected your device to power? Even better, what if you could easily send it to a messaging app like Discord, in an easy-to-read format?

Battery Webhook achieves this and also has:
- A fully modern design, built in Swift and SwiftUI
- Manual sending of battery info in the app
- Automations support with Shortcuts Automations
- Siri Shortcuts support
- A highly power efficient design, with minimal power usage

It is simple to use the app, just fill out a few basic details and you can send your device's battery info. If you ever run into any roadblocks, there's step-by-step documentation available.

Documentation: https://docs.thatstel.la/battery-webhook
Source code and bug reports: https://github.com/ThatStella7922/battery-webhook

Note: Battery Webhook is not affiliated with or endorsed by Discord Inc in any way. All trademarks are property of their respective owners.
Note 2: Battery Webhook installed from AltStore/SideStore does not include the Apple Watch app.

apps.name: Adobe Premiere: Video Editor
apps.localizedDescription:
Yêu cầu: IOS 17.0 trở lên 
Effortless editing. Total control. Meet the fast, free, and focused mobile video editing app that's powerful enough for any idea, yet simple enough for anyone to use. Edit videos from wherever you are, with no ads or watermarks. Premiere offers unmatched speed on a precise multi-track timeline and studio-quality audio featuring crystal clear voice recordings and perfectly timed AI sound effects -- plus Firefly-powered visuals to create stand out videos.

Tell your story with unique, scroll-stopping videos. Level up your content with AI editing tools and create stand out edits to share on TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and more. Record voiceovers and achieve studio-quality audio with crystal clear voice recordings and perfectly timed AI sound effects. Get inspired and kickstart your project with Adobe’s massive library of free creative assets. Speed up your editing with Adobe Firefly AI-generated sound effects, images, videos, and stickers.

Capture the moment and create trends with Adobe Premiere.

FEATURES:

LIGHTNING-FAST TIMELINE
• Frame-Accurate Edits: Trim, split, or merge video clips with the industry’s most accurate video editor.
• AI Auto Captions: generate captions and add attention grabbing animations in seconds.
• Smooth Speed Effects: speed up, slow down, reverse or freeze key moments.
• Unique Colour Presets: Apply Adobe Lightroom presets and fine tune to fit your aesthetic.
• Instant Background Removal: Cut out subjects with one tap. Create overlays, title effects, and more.

PRECISION CONTROL
• Unlimited Tracks: Overlay clips and organize your timeline with no limits to your creativity.
• Resize and Post to Any Platform: Adjust videos to fit any aspect ratio and share anywhere easily.
• Advanced Clip Controls: Flip, fit, fill, or extract audio to customise every cut.

STUDIO QUALITY SOUND
• AI Enhance Speech: Create studio quality voiceovers with the help of AI.
• DIY Sound Effects: Use your voice to generate your own sounds.

GENERATIVE AI ASSETS
• AI Text to Image Generation: create unique, commercially safe images from a simple text prompt with Adobe Firefly.
• Stickers That Pop: Generate your own AI stickers or select from the free in-app library.
• AI Background Expansion: Extend, enhance, or replace backgrounds with a prompt.

FREE LIBRARY OF CREATIVE ASSETS
• Get going with quality images, sounds, music, and video from the Adobe library.
• Add Music to Your Videos: Select from a library of free and royalty free tracks.
• Respects Creator Content Ownership: Adobe never trains on user content.

SPEED AND PERFORMANCE
• Built natively on iOS for a fast, smooth, editing experience.
• Import your assets directly from your device or favourite cloud storage provider.
• Edit without distracting pop-up ads, clutter, or watermarks.

FREE TO DOWNLOAD AND USE
• Everything you need to create great videos is available for free. Only pay when you need Firefly generative AI credits.

Photoshop on mobile simplifies your creative & design needs:

- Seamlessly fill selected portions of an image with content sampled from other parts of the image with Content Aware Fill.

apps.name: AdGuard  — adblock&privacy
apps.localizedDescription:
Yêu cầu: IOS 13.0 trở lên 
AdGuard is an ultra-efficient ad blocker for Safari. It will not only remove annoying ads but also secure your privacy with advanced tracking protection. AdGuard for iOS is an open source app, it’s totally transparent and safe to use. The app is free but offers additional paid Premium features for advanced users.

KEY FEATURES:

- Safari ad blocking. Removes all kinds of ads in Safari. Say goodbye to annoying banners, pop-ups and video ads. Whitelist your favorite websites or use manual blocking tool to hide any element on the page.

- Privacy protection. The web is full of trackers that literally watch your every click. AdGuard offers a selection of filters aimed directly at trackers and web analytics that will ensure your private data stays that way.

- Speed acceleration. Safari browser runs up to 4x faster. AdGuard removes tons of rubbish and you can freely surf the web!

- Reduced traffic consumption and increased battery life. Banners and ads sometimes add up to half the size of the page. By blocking them, you’re saving your battery life and Wi-Fi/mobile traffic.

- More than 50 popular subscriptions (EasyList, EasyPrivacy, etc.) plus AdGuard's own powerful ad filters, including language-specific filters. Together they don't leave ads a chance.

ADGUARD PREMIUM

AdGuard Premium includes the following features:

- Custom filters. Add your own filters by URL even if they are not on the default list.

- DNS privacy. Blocking regular online trackers is not enough if you want to assure 100% protection of your online privacy. Choose any of the user-favorite DNS providers or configure a custom DNS server.

- Security filters. Protect yourself from dangerous websites riddled with cryptojacking or fraud.

AdGuard Premium is a paid service with the subscription cost $0.99/month or $4.99/year or a one-time purchase of lifetime subscription $12.99 (prices may vary by region). Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. The account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period. Your subscriptions may be managed and your auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your iTunes Account Settings after purchasing a subscription.

* Privacy policy: https://adguard.com/privacy.html
* Terms of Use: https://adguard.com/eula.html

ABOUT ADGUARD

AdGuard is a leading company in developing ad blocking software for multiple platforms. For more than ten years AdGuard has been helping millions of users enjoy safe, clean, and fast internet.

Follow us at @AdGuard on Twitter, facebook.com/AdGuardEn/ on FB or send us a message at support@adguard.com.
